title: hieracium subumbelliforme
intro: Hieracium subumbelliforme, also known as False Hawkweed, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family, native to Europe and western Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, where its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic properties. The health benefits of Hieracium subumbelliforme include its ability to relieve symptoms of urinary tract infections, reduce inflammation, and support kidney function. The plant is typically prepared as a tincture, tea, or infusion, and can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
